versions.version_description: I have the tabs for the intro.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:

[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

But it's the only thing that I know[/tab]

you know it can get hard sometimes[/tab]

So you can keep me inside the pocket of your[/tab]

remember that with every piece of ya[/tab]

eyes meet, you won't ever be alone[/tab]

And if you hurt me that's ok baby, only[/tab]

words bleed inside these pages you just[/tab]

Or you can fit me inside the necklace you got when you were[/tab]

sixteen next to your heart beat where I [/tab]

words bleed inside these pages you just[/tab]
